receipt.goal: Discovery-first, contract-first analytics/lifecycle foundation pass with no vendor installation and no product behavior changes.
receipt.analytics_code_present: No third-party analytics SDKs found. Existing first-party click logging exists in /api/click and /go/[id].
known_risks_debt: Two click telemetry paths exist (`product_clicks` and `click_events`) and should be unified in a follow-up implementation PR.
Legacy fallback code paths remain for saved items and children naming columns; implementation PR should choose one canonical path.
Explicit sign-up flow is not currently represented; event semantics for signup_started/signup_completed need implementation-level guardrails.
receipt.next_starting_point: Implement PR 1 from the discovery doc: PostHog foundation with strict event allowlist and privacy middleware, then instrument only NOW events.
